# Word And

Word form of logical AND with lower precedence

```perl
$and_result = $a and $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$and_result = $a and $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$and_result = $a and $b;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
